since_last: 49% of 85 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.39%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -0.83% · Gold +1.21% · Nasdaq100 +0.42%. 49% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.39%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.39%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +8.76%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +8.76%, LRCX +5.71%, ASML +5.63%, ARM +5.41%, AVGO +5.06%. Laggards: SNAP -6.40%, META -2.91%, AI -2.84%, APP -2.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.10% at $194.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
